content.full_text:
December 11, 1990

Ms. Peggy Bernardy  
Attorney  
Legal Division  
Fair Political Practices Commission  
Post Office Box 807  
Sacramento, California 85804

RE: REQUEST FOR WRITTEN CONFIRMATION OF TELEPHONE OPINION

Dear Ms. Bernardy:

Thank you for researching the questions I presented to you on the telephone yesterday and for your expeditious response this afternoon. You advised me that the former City Clerk of the City of San Bernardino, who is now the San Bernardino City Administrator, may transfer any amount of funds in her pre-proposition 73 campaign account to the campaign committee for the current City Clerk for the City of San Bernardino.

You advised me that I could request a written confirmation of this oral opinion and this letter constitutes that request.

Thank you again for your efficient response to our inquiry.

Respectfully Submitted,

James F. Penman  
City Attorney

JFP:dd

cc: City Administrator  
    City Clerk
